birds.evidence: It winters in south-east Asia from eastern India and Bangladesh to Java. It has occurred as a vagrant in western Europe with the first record for Great Britain being in County Durham in 2009; this was the fifth record for the Western Palearctic{{cite web | url = https://www.birdguides.com/articles/the-eastern-crowned-warbler-in-co--durham | title = The Eastern Crowned Warbler in Co
